message:
fix(clippy): inline format args in ext_workloads.rs; normalize session.rs formatting

Resolve two clippy::uninlined_format_args errors in src/bin/ext_workloads.rs
(hotspot_matrix stage validation). Also re-apply rustfmt normalization to
session.rs drift from concurrent agents.
